title: Distribute PostgreSQL 18 with Citus 14
summary: The Citus 14.0 release is out and includes PostgreSQL 18 support! We know you've been waiting, and we've been hard at work adding features we believe will take your experience to the next level, focusing on bringing the Postgres 18 exciting improvements to you at distributed scale. title: Bits of wisdom from a year of Talking Postgres
summary: A year ago we renamed the Talking Postgres podcast—and just published our 29th episode. Since it’s a monthly thing, that means 13 new conversations in the past year. So this feels like a good moment to pause, reflect, and share a few highlights. If you’re already a listener, this post might help you find an episode you missed. If you’re…

title: Ultimate Guide to POSETTE: An Event for Postgres, 2025 edition
summary: POSETTE: An Event for Postgres 2025 is back for its 4th year—free, virtual, and packed with deep expertise. No travel needed, just your laptop, internet, and curiosity. This year’s 45 speakers are smart, capable Postgres practitioners—core contributors, performance experts, application developers, Azure engineers, extension maintainers—and their talks are as interesting as they are useful. The four livestreams (42 talks total)…
